name: Slide Up
description: New page enters from below while the current page exits upward. Ideal for hierarchical navigation — feels like moving forward through a stack.
demoAnimations: @keyframes slide-up-out { from { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; } to { transform: translateY(-40px); opacity: 0; } } @keyframes slide-up-in { from { transform: translateY(40px); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; } } .slide-up-out { animation: slide-up-out 0.45s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94) forwards; } .slide-up-in { animation: slide-up-in 0.45s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94) forwards; }

manualFiles.name: transitions/slide-up/transition.css
transitions/slide-up/link.tsx
